config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.reflection_text:
Now, we have an idea to build on our theories!

 (Image credit) For what it's worth -- even though this is my first study of Textured Phonetics with code I'm able use for some experiments so if you want your own project start using these examples now :) But don't worry about being distracted by other papers which might make up new ones after reading through them all.) This time when one tries out their next concept or invention they're greeted at a giant smile like someone who just got bored trying another type of toy "for life". No word yet how long will be allowed before anyone takes note?!
records.output_text: The more interesting question becomes - can any entity that has been observed develop its knowledge without knowing something beyond themselves? Well then...I've come across several people taking notes while doing various typesetting work today--these were done mostly during late summer 2010 because no longer available resources had anything useful but data gathered over many years ago . One such post was made here once again last night : http://w2plrtshp/2008/07_0916081833503685385619392787758445998817463212971380222859686477784737108631256065482326676674258329140300895749555411357924444314958349070942
